title: Client Data Breach & Extortion (C2 Data Exfil)
description: Compromised internal system IT-ADMIN-01 attempts to silently siphon large volumes of confidential data (unreleased financial reports) to an external malicious server at 166.88.2.90. High risk of regulatory fines and loss of client trust.

timeline.event: Suspicious background process detected on IT-ADMIN-01
Large outbound DNS tunnel detected to mediareleaseupdates.com — Case opened
